Fae is a shumpus. From statement 15, shumpuses are numpuses.\n3. From statement 12, numpuses are wumpuses.\n4. From statement 10, every wumpus is a sterpus.\n\nTherefore:\n- Since Fae is a shumpus (19), Fae is a numpus (15).\n- Since Fae is a numpus, Fae is a wumpus (12).\n- Since Fae is a wumpus, Fae is a sterpus (10).\n- Since sterpuses are not kind (7), Fae, being a sterpus, is not kind.\n\nThus, we have demonstrated logically that Fae is not
